holdings.infoBox: AQEC is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 2.00%, General Dynamics at 1.97%, Johnson & Johnson at 1.95%, GSK plc at 1.94%, and Apple at 1.92%.

overview.description: The AQE Core ETF (AQEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a global portfolio of large-cap equities. AQEC was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by Arlington.
